# TKB Strategies

**Human-centered strategy consulting for mission-driven organizations.**

TKB Strategies specializes in liberation-centered organizational development, executive coaching, and capacity building. We believe the frameworks, tools, and methodologies that strengthen organizations should be accessible - not locked behind proposals.

## What You'll Find Here

- **Open-source consulting frameworks** - Compassionate Agility, Liberation Mapping, and supporting methodologies developed through years of direct practice with nonprofits, social enterprises, and public-sector organizations.
- **WordPress plugins and tools** - Custom-built digital tools for assessment, capacity building, and organizational development, deployed on WordPress.
- **Workshop and presentation templates** - Reusable facilitation structures for training, retreats, and conference sessions.
- **Digital product source material** - Source content for guides, courses, and assessments distributed through Gumroad and other platforms.
- **Documentation site** - Browse our frameworks and methodology at [tkb-strategies.github.io](https://tkb-strategies.github.io).

## What You Won't Find Here

Client-specific data, engagement details, financials, or confidential organizational information. Our client work lives in private systems. This is the reusable, public-facing layer.

## About

TKB Strategies is led by Tekoah Boatner, CEO of Youth Oasis and founder of TKB Strategies. Learn more at [tkbstrategies.com](https://tkbstrategies.com).
